name: testSelectAcquirer
description: Check possibility to select an appropriate acquirer to merchant
descriptionHtml: Check possibility to select an appropriate acquirer to merchant

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Check possibility to select an appropriate acquirer to merchant

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0731.114103 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Verify the result of adding Acquirer within Gateway page table
